root_cause: flash_decode_attention_whole_cache with MAXC=4608 produces only 6 splits at ctx=512 (8*6=48 workgroups vs baseline 8*48=384). Grid is 8x under-occupied. Baseline gqa_coop_vec slices KV to actual ctx length; block tile reads full MAXC cache regardless of ctx.
reopen_condition: decode_flash_block_tile_g5_native_context: route the G=5 block tile through the standard flash path (sliced KV to actual ctx), not flash_decode_attention_whole_cache. Needs a flash_partial variant that accepts (q, k_slice, v_slice) instead of whole-cache, with grid Hkv*ceildiv(ctx,L) matching baseline occupancy.
